docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY STANTON, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2014 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2014 - JUDGMENT.
